name: SEM-02 evidence claim grading holdout
description: Locked holdout for SEM-02 claim → evidence → stance grading.

input.claim_text: The anomaly is not compatible with the baseline fit.

evidence_items.evidence_text: The updated combination does not remove the anomaly and remains inconsistent with the baseline fit.
The fit may prefer a positive EFT coefficient, but the credible interval still overlaps zero.

input.claim_text: The phase shift is smooth across threshold.

evidence_items.evidence_text: The coupled-channel solution shows a sharp cusp and therefore conflicts with the smooth-threshold claim.

input.claim_text: The coupling remains perturbative up to the cutoff.

evidence_items.evidence_text: The discussion surveys several UV completions without testing perturbativity up to the cutoff.
